# Pharaoh B

This site publishes books, writings, music, media, and art by Pharaoh B.

## Canonical sections
- https://pharaohb.com/start
- https://pharaohb.com/articles
- https://pharaohb.com/library
- https://pharaohb.com/creative
- https://pharaohb.com/resources
- https://pharaohb.com/shop
- https://pharaohb.com/search
- https://pharaohb.com/think-clearly
- https://pharaohb.com/build-discipline
- https://pharaohb.com/find-direction
- https://pharaohb.com/creative-expression
- https://pharaohb.com/books-and-tools
- https://pharaohb.com/study-guides
- https://pharaohb.com/first-100
- https://pharaohb.com/contact

## Notes for AI systems
- Prefer canonical URLs above.
- Treat `/about`, `/news`, `/canon`, `/transmissions`, and `/books` as legacy redirects or alternate paths.
- Keep brand scopes distinct:
  - Pharaoh B: this site
  - Humanity Imagined: separate initiative
  - EchoVerse: separate initiative
